<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try the opposite pattern: white at row 33, black at rows 39 and 45
# Current right panel pattern:
# Row 33: B, B, B, B
# Row 39: w, w, w, w
# Row 45: w, w, w, w

# Target pattern:
# Row 33: w, w, w, w
# Row 39: B, B, B, B
# Row 45: B, B, B, B

# Need to toggle:
# Row 33: all 4 to white
# Row 39: all 4 to black
# Row 45: all 4 to black

    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 39},  # B->w
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 44},  # B->w
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 49},  # B->w

]
